metadata.description: PancakeSwap-specific AI tools (skills, plugins, agents) for developers and AI agents integrating the PancakeSwap ecosystem.

plugins.name: pancakeswap-driver
plugins.description: AI-powered assistance for discovering tokens, planning swaps, and planning liquidity positions with deep links

plugins.name: pancakeswap-farming
plugins.description: Plan yield farming, CAKE staking, and reward harvesting with deep links to the PancakeSwap farming UI

plugins.name: pancakeswap-hub
plugins.description: Integrate and plan swaps through PanckaeSwap Hub
